category_sources: Official TiMidity++ site describes MIDI playback by converting MIDI files into PCM waveform data.
source_facts.description says it is a software synthesizer.
display_name_sources: Official site heading and project text use TiMidity++.
source_facts.homepage is the official TiMidity++ site.
docs_sources: Official TiMidity++ site provides general information, download/install information, community links, and an install page.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page for TiMidity++ exposes a Git source-control area; older official homepage also references SourceForge-hosted development access.
tags_sources: Official TiMidity++ site says it plays MIDI files and can save generated waveforms in audio formats.
